div.p: Entry Invariant: First digit already consumed by advance() in _scan_token()
Invariant: lexeme contains $D^+$ Action: advance() on digits
Invariant: lexeme contains $D+.D+$ Action: advance() on digits

ol.li: If digit: consume '.', transition to SCANNING_FRAC.
If not: leave '.' for next scan loop (will emit 3 as NUMBER).
peek() is EOF -> EMIT_NUMBER Result: NUMBER("42")
peek_next() is f -> EMIT_NUMBER Result: NUMBER("3") (Note: . remains in source)
